name: Research Plugin
description: Scientific workflow orchestration plugin for OpenClaw

defaultSandboxProfile.label: Default Sandbox Profile
defaultSandboxProfile.help: Sandbox profile used by validation and execution stages.

ragIndexRoot.label: RAG Index Root
ragIndexRoot.help: Absolute path for vector indexes and document caches.

ragStorePath.label: RAG Store Path
ragStorePath.help: JSON store used by Phase 2 local knowledge ingestion and retrieval tools.

taskGraphStore.label: Task Graph Store
taskGraphStore.help: Path for task-graph snapshots and execution traces.

runStorePath.label: Run Store Path
runStorePath.help: Directory used by Phase 3 sandbox manifests, logs, artifacts, snapshots, and replay records.

dockerImage.label: Docker Image
dockerImage.help: Default container image for the Phase 3 Docker sandbox adapter.

vtkSceneOutputDir.label: VTK Scene Output Directory
vtkSceneOutputDir.help: Directory used to export intermediate scene artifacts for vtk.js verification.
